title: Indicators and snapshots | Stats NZ
content:
## Indicators and snapshots
Get headline figures and overviews of New Zealand's wellbeing, population, environment, and economy.

## Ngā Tūtohu Aotearoa – Indicators Aotearoa NZ

## Environmental indicators

## New Zealand activity index (NZAC)
Get quick insights into our statistics with these visual representations.

## Historical snapshots
View statistical snapshots from New Zealand's past.

### Digitised collections and year books
Digitised collections Explore rare and historical print material, including yearbooks from 1893–2012, and census reports and results from 1871–1916.
Yearbook collection: 1893–2012 The New Zealand Official Yearbook has provided a comprehensive statistical picture of life in New Zealand from 1893 to 2012.
